name: Wam Income Maximiser Limited
analysis: WMX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.6937. Trade idea: entry A$1.7300, stop A$1.5978, target A$2.1266 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
